top_risks.title: No explicit max-chain-depth bound on multi-invocation continuation
top_risks.description: run_next_governed_cycle executes one cycle and emits next_cycle_decision_ref + next_cycle_input_bundle_ref. Nothing prevents an external orchestrator from chaining these indefinitely. Boundedness is local per-call but not global across the chain.
top_risks.why_it_matters: Misconfigured or adversarial caller can chain governed cycles indefinitely without human checkpoint.
top_risks.minimal_fix: Add continuation_depth to next_cycle_input_bundle. Add max_continuation_depth to execution_policy. Refuse if depth exceeds max.

top_risks.title: Timestamp-sourced nondeterminism when created_at is omitted
top_risks.description: When created_at is None, _utc_now() is used. Since created_at flows into _canonical_hash, the cycle_runner_result_id becomes nondeterministic across runs.
top_risks.why_it_matters: Replay and determinism verification depend on stable artifact IDs. Nondeterministic IDs break replay chain consistency.
top_risks.minimal_fix: Make created_at mandatory or exclude it from the ID hash seed.

top_risks.title: unresolved_blockers conflation with required_reviews in bundle generation
top_risks.description: _build_next_cycle_input_bundle sets unresolved_blockers = blocking_conditions + required_reviews. Any required review becomes an unresolved blocker, causing the runner to refuse execution even when blocking conditions are resolved.
top_risks.why_it_matters: Overly conservative refusal stalls the loop when the cycle is genuinely ready to proceed.
top_risks.minimal_fix: Only include blocking reviews in unresolved_blockers. Separate advisory reviews into active_risks or a new field.

top_risks.title: Broad exception swallowing masks root cause on execution failure
top_risks.description: except (SystemCycleOperatorError, ValueError, TypeError) catches broad exception types. Error strings are embedded in emitted_artifact_refs as error:{exc}, polluting the ref namespace.
top_risks.why_it_matters: ValueError/TypeError can mask unrelated bugs. Unstructured error strings in artifact refs may fail downstream validation.
top_risks.minimal_fix: Narrow except to SystemCycleOperatorError. Add error_detail field to cycle_runner_result schema.

top_risks.title: Trace ID cross-validation is string-equality only, no provenance chain
top_risks.description: Runner checks trace_id equality between decision and bundle but does not verify trace_id references a real previous cycle or chains to existing lineage. Fabricated matching trace IDs bypass validation.
top_risks.why_it_matters: Trace integrity is the foundation of replay and audit. Without provenance validation, synthetic decision+bundle pairs can bypass the governed chain.
top_risks.minimal_fix: Add source_cycle_runner_result_ref to next_cycle_input_bundle. Validate it references a previously emitted cycle_runner_result_id.

determinism_risks: Timestamp fallback: _utc_now() when created_at is None makes all downstream hashes nondeterministic
pqx_execute_fn opaqueness: injected execution function is a black box whose return value is not schema-validated inside run_next_governed_cycle
Sort stability: sorted(set(...)) is deterministic for strings but no type guard enforces string-only inputs
governance_risks: Control bypass via direct call: run_system_cycle can be called directly bypassing decision/bundle gating in run_next_governed_cycle
Program enforcement gap: decide_next_cycle does not validate that the program artifact is schema-valid or current
No authorization re-validation: authorization_signals are not re-validated against current control plane state at runner invocation time
boundedness_risks: Single-call bounded, multi-call unbounded: emitted next_cycle_decision_ref and next_cycle_input_bundle_ref enable implicit unbounded chaining
No timeout or resource budget: runner has no execution timeout; hanging run_system_cycle hangs the runner indefinitely
execution_policy not validated: no schema validation on execution_policy before pass-through to run_system_cycle
replay_risks: Trace ID is opaque string with permissive pattern; no enforcement that it references real trace lineage
No replay entry point in cycle_runner_result: result has emitted_artifact_refs but no structured replay entry point
bundle_consumption_summary is not schema-validated: uncontracted output surface
operator_risks: Refusal reason codes lack severity ranking: flat array with no primary/secondary distinction
No escalation channel: decision=escalate produces refusal but does not trigger escalation workflow
CLI exit codes are coarse: no distinction between expected stop and unexpected trace_mismatch refusal

recommended_actions.description: Add continuation_depth to next_cycle_input_bundle and enforce max_continuation_depth in runner
Make created_at mandatory in run_next_governed_cycle to eliminate timestamp nondeterminism
Add error_detail field to cycle_runner_result schema; narrow except clause to SystemCycleOperatorError
Add source_cycle_runner_result_ref to next_cycle_input_bundle for provenance chain validation
Schema-validate execution_policy before passing to run_system_cycle
